title: rauvolfia verticillata var. macrophylla
intro: Rauvolfia verticillata var. macrophylla, also known as the large-leaved rauvolfia, is a plant species native to tropical Asia, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which make it useful for treating conditions such as hypertension, anxiety, and insomnia. The health benefits of rauvolfia verticillata var. macrophylla include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve sleep quality. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically dried and used to make teas, tinctures, and extracts, which can be used to support cardiovascular health and promote relaxation.
